translations.en: an uncomfortable looking man sitting behind a cup of tea.
translations.zh: 一個神情侷促的男子，坐在一杯茶後面。

translations.en: "Can't talk now. I'm--ungh!" He reels from a punch to his belly.
translations.zh: 「現在沒空說話，我在——啊！」他被人打了一拳肚子，搖晃起來。

translations.en: "I'm in the middle of something, $G. Ouch!"
translations.zh: 「在下正在忙，$G。哎喲！」

translations.en: "Hello." His gaze darts from side to side, lingering longingly on the mugs of ale his fellow patrons are gulping down heartily.
translations.zh: 「你好。」他的目光左右閃動，對旁邊顧客大口痛飲的麥酒杯子投以充滿渴望的眼神。

translations.en: "Well, I'm still Captain Elad."
translations.zh: 「嗯，在下仍是伊拉德船長。」

translations.en: He looks at you uneasily. "I'm @Captain Elad. Not that it's any business of yours..."
translations.zh: 他不安地看著汝。「在下是@Captain（伊拉）德船長，不過這與汝無關……」

translations.en: "I was Captain of the Theodosia Marie--until she @sank."
translations.zh: 「在下曾是狄奧多西亞·瑪麗號的船長——直到她@sank（沉沒）。」

translations.en: When you say 'Captain,' all the pirates at the table turn to you expectantly.
translations.zh: 汝說出「船長」二字，桌旁所有海盜都轉過頭來滿懷期待地看著汝。

translations.en: When they realize you weren't talking to them, they return to their business.
translations.zh: 當他們意識到汝並非在叫他們，便各自回去繼續做事了。

translations.en: "Captain John, that fool... He was captured by gargoyles."
translations.zh: 「約翰船長，那個蠢貨……他被魔像族俘虜了。」

translations.en: "I hear they dragged him down into Hythloth, and nobody's seen hide nor hair of him since."
translations.zh: 「在下聽說他們把他拖入海索洛斯，從此再無人見過他的蹤影。」

translations.en: Leonna raises an eyebrow. "Is that so? I could tell a different tale..."
translations.zh: 利昂娜挑起眉毛。「是這樣嗎？在下聽到的版本可不一樣……」

translations.en: "Aye, 'twas a terrible ordeal. We were sailing just off @Bordermarch when the whole island started @shaking."
translations.zh: 「是的，那真是一場可怕的災難。我們正在@Bordermarch（邊境）地附近航行，整個島嶼突然開始@shaking（震動）。」

translations.en: "Must have been one of those @earthquakes we've been having."
translations.zh: 「必定是近來接連發生的@earthquakes（地震）之一。」

translations.en: "The whole island sank beneath the waves. We were caught in the huge @whirlpool left in its wake."
translations.zh: 「整個島嶼沉入波濤之下，我們陷入了它留下的巨大@whirlpool（旋渦）之中。」

translations.en: "I was one of the lucky few to swim clear. But my ship's on the bottom of the ocean now, and that's the honest truth."
translations.zh: 「在下是幸運地游出來的少數人之一，但在下的船現在躺在海底了，這是實話。」

translations.en: He shudders, then takes a sip of his tea. "I don't like to think about it."
translations.zh: 他打了個寒顫，呷了一口茶。「在下不願去想那件事。」

translations.en: "A fair sized island, and now she's gone! Some o' them @earthquakes have been mighty fierce."
translations.zh: 「一個相當大的島嶼，如今消失了！那些@earthquakes（地震）中有幾次猛烈異常。」

translations.en: "Yes, they started soon after Lord @British was @rescued from the underworld."
translations.zh: 「是的，那些地震在不列顛@British（王）從地下世界獲@rescued（救）後不久就開始了。」

translations.en: "I lost my ship to the last one."
translations.zh: 「在下的船就毀於最近那次。」

translations.en: "I'd toast him with you, but this," he gestures disparagingly at his cup, "is hardly fitting for such an honor."
translations.zh: 「在下本想與汝為他乾杯，但這個，」他鄙夷地指著杯子，「根本不配這等榮耀。」
translations.note: 想喝酒卻在戒酒，只能喝茶

translations.en: "Surely you've heard tales of the Avatar's bold exploits?"
translations.zh: 「汝必定聽聞過聖者的英勇事蹟吧？」

translations.en: "It was all anyone was talking about round here for weeks."
translations.zh: 「這件事連續好幾週是此地人人談論的話題。」

translations.en: "I wish I had one of them... I bet I could sell it for a pretty penny!"
translations.zh: 「在下真希望有一枚……在下敢說能賣個好價錢！」

translations.en: "You don't hear much about the @virtues in a pirate town..."
translations.zh: 「在海盜鎮上，關於@virtues（美德）的話題是聽不到多少的……」

translations.en: "I could use more virtue in me life. I've just given up @drinking, to start with."
translations.zh: 「在下生命中需要更多美德，先從戒@drinking（飲酒）做起。」

translations.en: "Aye, 'tis quite a @temptation."
translations.zh: 「是的，這是相當大的@temptation（誘惑）。」

translations.en: "Indeed." He takes another big gulp of tea.
translations.zh: 「確實如此。」他再次大口喝了口茶。

translations.en: "Ah, that's not important."
translations.zh: 「啊，那不重要。」

translations.en: The pirate smiles and waves goodbye, then scowls as he turns back to his mug of tea.
translations.zh: 海盜微笑揮手道別，然後轉回對著那杯茶皺眉。

translations.en: "Wait, before you go..."
translations.zh: 「等等，汝離開之前……」

translations.en: "I was wondering--do you know the @Mantra of Honesty?"
translations.zh: 「在下在想——汝可知道@Mantra（真言）真言？」

translations.en: "Oh. Well, let me know if you find out later."
translations.zh: 「哦，若汝之後得知，告訴在下。」

translations.en: "I've been trying to find out what it is, so that I can better myself."
translations.zh: 「在下一直在試著找出那是什麼，以便改善自己。」

translations.en: "I'll give you five gold if you tell me. Is it a deal?"
translations.zh: 「汝若告訴在下，在下給汝五金，成交嗎？」

translations.en: "I'll be here with the money if you change your mind."
translations.zh: 「若汝改變心意，在下帶著錢在這裡等汝。」

translations.en: "Okay, what is it?"
translations.zh: 「好，那是什麼？」

translations.en: The pirate frowns.
translations.zh: 海盜皺起眉頭。

translations.en: "Thank you! Now my meditations will succeed at last!"
translations.zh: 「謝謝汝！在下的靜思終於能成功了！」

translations.en: As you turn to leave, you think you might have caught a glimpse of Captain Elad stealing a swig from someone else's mug... But you can't be sure.
translations.zh: 汝轉身離去時，似乎瞥見伊拉德船長悄悄從別人的杯子裡偷喝了一口……但汝不敢確定。

translator_notes: 112 Elad: 鴉爪鎮落魄船長，正在戒酒（卻渴望麥酒）。船沉於邊境地地震所引發的旋渦。想知道誠實真言（願意付5金）。結尾諷刺：汝一離開他便偷喝別人的酒。
